opinion.h: William HELIS, petitioner, v. Mrs. Itasca Kinney WARD, as Executrix, etc., et al. No. 68.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Eugene D. Saunders, of New Orleans, La., for petitioner.
The motion of Agnes E. Lewis and others for leave to intervene is denied. The motion to proceed further in forma pauperis is also denied.[ Helis v. Ward 308 U.S. 521 (1939) ]
